data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ Fixes: (1) test-discover-agents.sh: updated expected stderr log count from 9 to 10 matching routing conf. (2) design-approve.sh: replaced ../ relative path with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT-based resolution. (3) test-playwright-cli-validation.sh: shared browser session to reduce total runtime from ~90s to ~45s. (4) merge-conflict-regression: passes already, no fix needed.
